description_long: This is a black Coca-Cola Zero can with a slightly contoured cylindrical shape, made of aluminum and featuring a glossy finish. The can displays prominent red and white Coca-Cola Zero branding, with nutritional information and barcodes visible on the back. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. The can is placed on a wooden surface, which is not part of the object itself. The surface of the can appears smooth and reflective, with no visible dents or damage. The can is typical of those found in urban environments, such as streets, parks, or public spaces.
description: A glossy black Coca-Cola Zero aluminum can with red and white branding, smooth surface, and a silver pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola Zero logo in large red and white letters, with the pull-tab top visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying nutritional information, barcode, and recycling symbols on the black background.
description_view_2: Side view with the Coca-Cola Zero logo partially visible and the can's volume marking (330ml) near the base.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the vertical 'zero' text and part of the Coca-Cola logo, with the pull-tab top in view.
attribute_label_or_branding: Coca-Cola Zero logo in red and white, nutritional information, barcode, recycling symbols, and volume marking (330ml) printed on the can.
